name: Tenant Directory
description: All tenants list with search, filters, bulk actions, and summary stats. Supports card and table views.

slots.summary: Total tenants, active, past due counts
slots.filters: Search, status filter, property filter, lease expiring filter

cards.description: Visual card grid of tenants with avatar, property, and lease status displayed per card

visual_brief: Directory page with a header containing 'Tenants' title, a search input, and an 'Add Tenant' button. Summary stats show total tenants, active leases, and average occupancy. Filter controls offer search by name, filter by property/status. The main area displays tenant cards in a responsive grid (cards preset) or a data table (table preset) with columns for avatar, name, property, unit, lease dates, payment status, and actions. Pagination controls at the bottom for large directories.

responsive.mobile: Single-column tenant cards. Summary in a compact bar. Filters collapse to a button. Search is full-width.
responsive.tablet: Two-column card grid or table with horizontal scroll. Filters visible.
responsive.desktop: Three-column card grid or full-width table. All summary, filters, and pagination visible.

composition.TenantDirectory: Container(d-section, flex-col, gap-4) > [Header + Filters + SummaryStats? + TenantList + Pagination]
